nodes.name: Telegram — Send URL
nodes.notes: Replace with your actual Telegram bot credentials and chat ID

parameters.jsCode:
const d = $input.first().json;

const content = 'Return ONLY raw JSON, no markdown, no backticks. ' +
  'Portfolio as of ' + d.timestamp + '. ' +
  'MooMoo SG Total: S$' + d.total_value + ' PL: S$' + d.total_pl + '. ' +
  'DragonFi PERA+ Total: PHP ' + d.pera_total_val + ' PL: PHP ' + d.pera_total_pl + '. ' +
  'USDSGD: ' + d.usdsgd + ' PHPSGD: ' + d.phpsgd + ' ETH: S$' + d.eth_sgd + '. ' +
  'Alerts: ' + (d.alerts.length ? d.alerts.join(', ') : 'None') + '. ' +
  'MooMoo SG Positions: ' + d.rows.map(r => r.n + ' ' + (r.pct >= 0 ? '+' : '') + r.pct.toFixed(1) + '% S$' + Math.round(r.val)).join(', ') + '. ' +
  'DragonFi PERA+ Positions: ' + d.peraRows.map(r => r.n + ' ' + (r.pct >= 0 ? '+' : '') + r.pct.toFixed(1) + '% PHP' + Math.round(r.val)).join(', ') + '. ' +
  'Context: Bobby is a Singapore-based OFW investor. ' +
  'MooMoo SG: KepDC (data center REIT), CICT (commercial), FCT/J69U (Frasers suburban retail), JYEU (Lendlease commercial), AIMS (industrial), BYD (HK SDR China EV), NVDA, TSLA, ETH, BGF World Mining Fund, Fullerton stable cash. BYD concentration risk if above 25pct. ' +
  'DragonFi PERA+: Philippine REITs and stocks held in a tax-advantaged PERA account. AREIT (Ayala Land REIT premier retail/office), CREIT (Citicore renewable energy REIT), MBT (Metrobank largest PH bank), MREIT (Megaworld REIT office), RCR (RL Commercial REIT Robinsons office). PSE market context applies. ' +
  'Return this JSON: {' +
  '"overall_summary":"4 to 5 sentences. Cover combined portfolio health across both MooMoo SG and DragonFi PERA+, what is driving todays P/L in each, and overall sentiment.",' +
  '"detailed_analysis":"8 to 10 sentences. Analyze each holding individually: each SG REIT, BYD and China macro, NVDA and TSLA in US tech climate, ETH crypto sentiment, BGF Mining and commodity cycle, Fullerton as anchor. Then cover each PERA+ holding: AREIT office/retail outlook, CREIT renewable energy play, MBT banking sector, MREIT office demand, RCR Robinsons commercial. Be specific.",' +
  '"watchlist":"3 to 4 sentences. Suggest 2 to 3 specific stocks or REITs Bobby does not currently hold in either portfolio. Include ticker, exchange, reason, and how it complements his existing mix.",' +
  '"portfolio_status":"UP or DOWN or FLAT",' +
  '"biggest_mover":{"name":"","direction":"UP or DOWN","note":"one line"},' +
  '"positions":[{"name":"","pct":0.0,"status":"STRONG or OK or WATCH or ALERT","commentary":"max 12 words"}],' +
  '"pera_positions":[{"name":"","pct":0.0,"status":"STRONG or OK or WATCH or ALERT","commentary":"max 12 words"}],' +
  '"alerts":[{"level":"RED or YELLOW or GREEN","title":"","body":"1 to 2 sentences"}],' +
  '"recommendation":"3 to 4 sentences. Actionable advice across both portfolios — what to trim, hold, or add and why. Most urgent action first.",' +
  '"market_context":"2 sentences covering macro relevant to both SG and PH markets — SGD rates, US Fed, China outlook, PSE sentiment, crypto."}';

return [{ json: { 
  ...d,
  claudeContent: content,
  claudeRole: 'user'
} }];
